creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 229093
patch to unbreak the typespeed port

Scenario:
- FreeBSD releng/13.0
- latest ports
- using "portmaster games/typespeed"

Result:
- fails because port is marked broken on FreeBSD 13 (and 14)

Expected result:
- Apply the attached patch and unbreak the port.

-- Martin
